brief.coreMessage: Focus on HIPAA compliance in healthcare

headlines: Telnyx Voice AI: HIPAA-Ready Voice Solutions for Healthcare
Secure Healthcare Communications with Telnyx Voice AI
Telnyx Voice AI Ensures HIPAA and SOC 2 Compliance in Healthcare
99.999% Uptime and Sub-200ms Latency for Healthcare Voice AI
One Platform for HIPAA-Compliant Voice AI Across 140+ Countries
Healthcare Voice AI with End-to-End HIPAA and PCI Compliance
Telnyx Owns Network for Secure, Low-Latency Healthcare Voice AI
HIPAA-Ready Voice AI with SOC 2 Type II Compliance and 99.999% Uptime
Telnyx Voice AI: Secure Voice Infrastructure Built for Healthcare
Reduce Latency and Maintain HIPAA Compliance with Telnyx Voice AI
descriptions: Telnyx Voice AI offers a single platform with full HIPAA, SOC 2 Type II, and PCI compliance, supporting healthcare providers in 140+ countries. Our own network infrastructure delivers sub-200ms latency and 99.999% uptime, ensuring secure and reliable voice communication.

Healthcare organizations require trust and compliance. Telnyx Voice AI operates on a proprietary network, not resold services, providing HIPAA-ready voice AI with SOC 2 Type II certification and PCI compliance. Experience low latency and high availability across 140+ countries.

With Telnyx Voice AI, healthcare providers get a unified platform designed for HIPAA compliance and operational resilience. Our network ownership enables sub-200ms latency voice AI inference co-located with telephony, backed by 99.999% uptime and SOC 2 Type II controls.

Telnyx Voice AI supports healthcare communication needs with a focus on compliance and performance. Our infrastructure, covering over 140 countries, meets HIPAA, SOC 2 Type II, and PCI standards. We deliver sub-200ms latency and 99.999% uptime for critical voice applications.

Secure voice AI in healthcare requires more than compliance. Telnyx owns the network infrastructure enabling HIPAA-ready voice AI with SOC 2 Type II and PCI compliance. Our platform operates with sub-200ms latency and 99.999% uptime, simplifying global healthcare communications.
